title: Creamy Jamaican Avocado Bowl
description: A fresh, creamy bowl bursting with Jamaican flavors, featuring sweet molasses glaze, tangy pickled cucumber, and a splash of lime juice.

ingredients.name: ripe avocados
ingredients.notes: cut in half, remove pit, scoop flesh into a bowl

instructions: Heat a skillet over medium heat and lightly warm the black beans for about 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
In a small saucepan, combine coconut milk, molasses, lime juice, grated ginger, and 1 teaspoon of kosher salt. Warm over low heat until the molasses is fully dissolved, about 3 minutes.
In a large mixing bowl, gently mash the avocado pieces with a fork until creamy but still chunky.
Fold in the warmed black beans, corn kernels, diced mango, pickled cucumber, and cilantro.
Pour the molasses‑coconut sauce over the mixture and gently stir until everything is evenly coated.
Taste and adjust seasoning with additional salt if needed.
Transfer the bowl to a serving dish or keep in the bowl itself.
Drizzle with a teaspoon of olive oil, if desired, and serve immediately.
